### RECENT DECISIONS

Cycle 2: The centroid lifts and the room begins to listen — a second anchor enters softly: a head bowed in shadow, the solitary-interior posture that will carry through to the final tableau.
  - addImage({"query":"head bowed in shadow with soft side light, solitary figure at dusk","position":"mid-right, medium","motion":{"preset":"breathe","feature":"hijaz_intensity","intensity":0.7},"reactivity":[{"p)

Cycle 3: The pitch lifts to C# — I'll warm the background gently and add a second, higher line of moonlight that breathes with the phrase, sitting above the first so the room feels it widening.
  - setBackground({"css_background":"radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 55%, rgba(196,137,74,0.16) 0%, rgba(74,102,112,0.10) 35%, rgba(20,16,14,0.96) 70%, #0c0908 100%)"})

Cycle 4: The room warms with the climb to C#: an open palm in low candlelight enters as the figurative heart, breathing with the phrase.
  - addImage({"query":"open palm cupped around small candle flame in low light","position":"center, large","motion":{"preset":"breathe","feature":"hijaz_intensity","intensity":0.6},"reactivity":[{"property":"satur)

### FUTURE PREVIEW

Cycle 6 (t=35s): Intense, rising sharply. Balanced timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center G# with secondary emphasis on A. Developing.
Cycle 7 (t=40s): Intense, falling. Balanced timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center G# with secondary emphasis on C#. Developing.
Cycle 8 (t=45s): Intense, falling. Very bright timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center D with secondary emphasis on C#. Developing.

### COMPOSITION INTENT FOR THIS CYCLE

Active act: first ascent — warmth gathers (Centroid rises and pitch shifts to C# / G#. The room warms: an open palm finding low candlelight, loose linen catching soft side light. Begin gentle motion on one anchor; do not crowd.)
Cycle intent: Peak intensity, dense articulation. A composite scene arrives: text + SVG bloom + image. The room commits to its first weight.
Energy hint: high

### TASK

Emit tool calls per `tools.json` (in the system prefix). Honor the
audited Bayati visual vocabulary. Do not output anything other than
the rationale text block followed by tool calls.
